Mixed martial arts events
2000 in Shooto
Information
First dateJanuary 14, 2000
Last dateDecember 17, 2000
Events
Total events13
Fights
Total fights101
Title fights4
Chronology
1999 in Shooto 2000 in Shooto 2001 in Shooto

The year 2000 is the 12th year in the history of Shooto, a mixed martial arts promotion based in the Japan. In 2000 Shooto held 13 events beginning with, Shooto: R.E.A.D. 1.

Title fights

[edit]
Title fights in 2000
Weight class Method Round Time Event Notes
Middleweight Hayato Sakurai def. Tetsuji Kato Decision (Split) 3 5:00 Shooto: R.E.A.D. 2 [a]
Featherweight Alexandre Franca Nogueira (c) def. Uchu Tatsumi Submission (Guillotine Choke) 1 1:57 Shooto: R.E.A.D. 9 [b]
Lightweight Caol Uno def. Rumina Sato KO (Punch) 1 2:21 Shooto: R.E.A.D. Final [c]
Bantamweight Mamoru Yamaguchi def. Jin Akimoto Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00 Shooto: R.E.A.D. Final [d]
  1. ^ For The Middleweight Champion.
  2. ^ For The Featherweight Champion.
  3. ^ For The Lightweight Champion.
  4. ^ For The Bantamweight Champion.

Shooto: R.E.A.D. 1

[edit]

Shooto: R.E.A.D. 1[1] was an event held on January 14, 2000, at Korakuen Hall in Tokyo, Japan.
